title: RedecomposeDeltaConfirmation
description: Confirmation submitted by the decomposer agent after it WRITES a managed delta document (trigger/provenance/operations, tools/decomposition-update/apply_delta.py's format) to delta_path. The delta itself is the transaction input; this is a lightweight bind for the story to log and cross-check against the applied result.

trigger.description: One-line reason this re-decompose is happening, copied into the delta's own 'trigger' field (e.g. 'epic revised: added rate-limit requirement').

added.description: Brief ids the delta adds via add_change operations — must match the delta document written to delta_path.
